creator: ports@grosbein.net
text:
12.06.2012 04:32, cs@FreeBSD.org ÐÉÛÅÔ:
> Synopsis: [patch] [maintainer] unbreak port databases/libudbc
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: cs
> State-Changed-When: Mon Jun 11 21:31:28 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Does not install here as it seems to use compat4x-i386-5.3_9 which has known vulnerabilities. Could you please update the entire port.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168943

Well, I have not used this port for some years and had no signs of interest in it from others.
UDBC's vendor does not support this closed-source library anymore.
It depends on vulnerable compat4x and I'm not in position to update they both or in parts.

I request removal of the port.

Eugene Grosbein
